prestazioni: Engine swap to a VW EA827 2.0L 16V (engine code: **ABF**) with forged internals (Mahle forged pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ARP head studs) and a custom billet crankshaft by **JE Pistons** for 1,000+ hp potential. Turbocharged with a **Garrett GTX4202R** on a custom tubular manifold by **SPEARCO**, paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm** wastegate and **Precision Turbo 50mm** blow-off valve. Fuel system upgraded with **Bosch 044** high-flow fuel pump, **ID1000x** injectors, and a **Radium Engineering** dual fuel rail setup.

Custom **Haltech Elite 2500** standalone ECU with **Motec PDM15** power distribution module for precise ignition timing and boost control. Full **3.5" aluminum intercooler piping** by **Vivid Racing** with a **GReddy Type-RS** front-mount intercooler. Exhaust system features a **custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe** with a **Supersprint** 76mm cat-back system, including a **REMUS** titanium muffler for weight savings.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV** coilovers (custom valved for the Voyage’s **A00/A01** chassis), **Whiteline** adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and **SuperPro** poly bushings for the rear torsion beam. Braking system upgraded to **Brembo GT 355mm** front rotors with **6-piston calipers** and **Ferodo DS2500** pads, paired with **StopTech** stainless steel brake lines and **Motul RBF660** brake fluid.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1** widebody kit (custom-fitted for the Voyage’s **A00/A01** platform) with **carbon fiber front splitter** and **rear diffuser** by **Seibon**. Rear wing is a **Voltex Type-3** (adapted for the Voyage’s trunk dimensions) with **adjustable carbon fiber endplates**. Front bumper lip is a **custom 3D-printed ABS** piece with integrated **LED DRLs** by **Lux H8** and **Morimoto XB LED** fog lights.

Custom **Rotiform LAS-R** 17x9.5" wheels (ET15 offset) with **Nankang AR-1** semi-slick tires (225/45/17 front, 245/40/17 rear). Fender flares are **painted in BASF Glasurit 99 Line** (color-matched to **VW L539 Reflex Silver**) with **vinyl-wrapped roof** in **3M Gloss Black**. Side skirts are **custom fiberglass** with **LED side markers** by **Diode Dynamics**.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a **Sparco Pro 2000** roll cage (bolt-in, FIA-certified), **Recaro SPG XL** seats with **Schroth Profi II-6** harnesses, and a **MOMO Mod.78** steering wheel on a **NRG quick-release** hub. Dashboard replaced with a **custom carbon fiber panel** housing a **AEM X-Series** digital dash and **Pioneer AVH-4200NEX** head unit. Sound deadening removed and replaced with **Dynamat Xtreme** for weight reduction.
